issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response:
If the cardholder does not have, or is unwilling to present cardholder identification, the merchant must honour the card.

Learn the steps to ensure the legitimacy of every Visa card, cardholder and transaction.

Make sure the card is valid and has not been altered in any way.

If the name on the identification does not match the name on the card, the merchant may decide whether to accept the card.
